pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which hardcodes this path as the target output file.

Verified by downloading the source datasets (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip, ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.zip, ne_110m_populated_places.zip) via URLs in install_gvsig.sh, checking their contents, and ensuring the keywords map exactly to the shapefile names and directories.
Verified by checking a pre-built gvSIG project file (data/projects/countries_base.gvsproj) which is 49.6KB, confirming 1KB is a valid minimum file size threshold for a project file.

privileged_info_summary: The task expects the user to output a gvSIG project file to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/reference_map.gvsproj. The generated file size is expected to exceed 1024 bytes, which is confirmed to be a reasonable minimum size (a pre-built 1-layer gvSIG project is ~49KB). The map must include 3 distinct vector layers: countries (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp), rivers (ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp), and cities (ne_110m_populated_places.shp). The data is real public domain Natural Earth GIS data.
